arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag's stance on Premier League return after Man Utd sacking
arts.sum: More than a month has passed since Erik ten Hag was sacked by Manchester United, and the former Ajax manager has been biding his time before taking his next job

arts.ttl: “I’m happy” – Goalkeeper indicates he rejected Manchester United and Chelsea, has no regrets about decision
arts.sum: In the summer of 2023, Manchester United were linked with a move for goalkeeper Zion Suzuki. That is when Chelsea were also looking to sign a goalkeeper and they ended up signing both Robert Sanchez and Djordje Petrovic. The Red Devils signed Andre Onana, who has excelled for them this season. arts.ttl: Man Utd 'Very Keen' to Sign £400,000-a-Week Barcelona Star for Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United are among a number of Premier League clubs interested in Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest fans all ‘agree’ one thing must change at Nottingham Forest
Man Utd make HUGE push for Alphonso Davies
arts.sum: The Canada international is out of contract with the Bundesliga club at the end of the season and both sides have failed to come to terms over a new deal. Manchester United have reportedly ‘asked’ for a meeting with the entourage of Bayern Munich left-back Alphonso Davies, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Evangelos Marinakis makes exciting Nottingham Forest prediction
'I'd be amazed' - Alan Shearer chimes in on issue at Manchester United everybody is talking about
arts.sum: Man Utd do not have a prolific goalscorer and Ruben Amorim could look to sign another striker in the summer window.

arts.ttl: Man Utd star told he's got lucky with appointment of Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's arrival at Manchester United has seen him reunite with Manuel Ugarte, whom he worked with at Sporting Lisbon, and the Uruguayan is already benefiting

arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Chelsea and Man Utd chase Danish wing-back, Brighton in for Scottish star
arts.sum: The transfer market remains closed until January but clubs are still extremely busy behind the scenes as they plan for future arrivals. Players all around the world have returned to their clubs...

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd challenged to sign Samu; Real Madrid join Salah race
arts.sum: Friday's football transfer rumours, with updates on Samu, Mohamed Salah, Trent Alexander-Arnold, Alexander Isak, Kevin De Bruyne & more.
